about.label: Our Story
about.body: Um Anas Kitchen is a home kitchen dedicated to preparing all kinds of salads, pastries and whatever you can imagine, all made by Um Anas with original flavors and lots of love for the details. Try it once and you won’t forget it — we gladly take all kinds of orders, for every occasion and every home.

reservations.title: Reserve
reservations.subtitle: Provide your details and we'll find the best seats for you
reservations.name: Full Name
reservations.booking_success: Reservation confirmed! We'll be in touch soon.
reservations.booking_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

occasions.title: Occasions
occasions.headline: Pre‑order catering for your occasion
occasions.subtitle:
If you have a wedding, birthday, family gathering or any special occasion — fill in the details here and we’ll get back to you to plan everything in advance.
Note: for weddings we need at least 2 weeks’ notice, and for birthdays or smaller parties 2–3 days in advance depending on the number of guests.
occasions.name: Full name
occasions.phone_required_hint: Please provide at least one valid phone number
occasions.phone_invalid_message: Phone format is not valid. Examples: 0501234567, +972501234567 or +9720501234567
occasions.notes_placeholder: For example: salad buffet, hot pastries, number of trays, allergies, delivery location…
occasions.leadtime_wedding: For weddings and engagements we kindly ask for at least 2 weeks’ notice so we can prepare everything properly.
occasions.leadtime_other: For birthdays and smaller parties please try to book at least 2–3 days in advance depending on guest count.
occasions.urgent_note: If your occasion is sooner than this, please contact us directly on WhatsApp — sometimes we can still help depending on kitchen load.
occasions.whatsapp_fallback: Or send us a direct WhatsApp message with your occasion details
occasions.whatsapp_template: Hi, my name is {name} and I’d like to order for an occasion ({occasion}) on {date} for about {guests} guests.
occasions.submit_error: Something went wrong while sending your request. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.
occasions.success_body: Thank you for trusting us. Um Anas will contact you soon to confirm details, portions and pricing.
